title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
